design_philosophy.core_loop: Select team, pitch/bat through innings, manage game state across multiple rounds to achieve victory
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time reaction timing between pitcher and batter; strategic pitch selection vs. batter anticipation
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Manage and play a baseball team competitively against AI opponents
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Early arcade-style sports simulation that abstracts baseball into reactive batting/pitching mechanics rather than deep statistical management; treats sports as action game first

difficulty.checkpointing: Full game progression per match; no mid-game saves documented
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Team selection may affect baseline difficulty; pitch type selection provides strategic variation

progression.unlock_mechanism: Team selection from available rosters (5 teams in Japanese version, 5 teams in international version)
replayability_hooks: Multiple team rosters with distinct uniform colors
Regional team variants (NPB Central League vs MLB teams)

world_building_techniques: Regional localization (Japanese NPB teams vs American MLB teams)

faction_indicators: Playable team rosters (Hiroshima Toyo Carp, Chunichi Dragons, Yomiuri Giants, Yakult Swallows, Hanshin Tigers in Japan)
International equivalents (Oakland Athletics, St Louis Cardinals, Los Angeles Dodgers, Philadelphia Phillies, Kansas City Royals, New York Yankees)
environmental_storytelling: Regional localization reflects cultural sports preferences (NPB vs MLB)
Team uniform colors provide visual faction identity

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor: Baseball (NES, Famicom Disk System)
